prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Magnuson TVS2650 supercharger kit (6.2L Hellcat-derived SRT engine code: ESF) with a 3.0L rotor pack, 10-rib pulley system, and a custom heat exchanger from PWR North America to reduce intake temps by 25°F under full boost (12 psi peak).

Full fuel system overhaul with Fore Innovations 450 LPH dual-pump fuel system, ID1700x injectors, and a Radium Engineering port injection kit to support 900+ WHP on E85, paired with a Motec M150 ECU for closed-loop ethanol blending and individual cylinder trims.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a ZF 8HP95 8-speed transmission built by RPM Transmissions with a billet torque converter (4,500 stall), Sonnax upgraded valve body, and a PML differential cover with additional cooling fins, paired with a Quaife ATB differential for the rear Dana 60 axle.
estetica: Widebody conversion using a Prior Design PD-GC1 kit with carbon fiber fender flares (3.5" wider front, 4.0" wider rear) and custom-machined aluminum inner fender liners to clear 22x12" ET15 HRE FF01 wheels with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (305/30 front, 325/25 rear).

Full carbon fiber aero package from APR Performance, including a GT-250 adjustable rear wing (30" chord, 65° max angle), front splitter with integrated dive planes, and a custom carbon fiber hood with a 5" cowl scoop to duct air into the Magnuson supercharger.

Interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs), a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede), and a custom roll cage from Autopower Industries (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) with integrated harness bars for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses.
